programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey gets invited to join the Dog River Women's Club, but soon realizes that it isn't right for her.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: It's the eve of Brent's 40th birthday; to celebrate, the town has planned a midnight party complete with fireworks and a parade.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.sub-title: Sunday in the Park With Jorge
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green must determine whether a woman's death was related to a rash of attacks by a crazed mob in Central Park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: Two ballers, opposites who are seemingly miles apart, find they might have more in common than they imagined possible.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Triangle of Sadness
programme.desc: Two models and a cleaning lady become stranded on a desert island with a group of billionaires.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When someone murders Capt. Frederick Burns, Aurora Teagarden must solve the case, despite never seeing eye to eye with the man.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Pie to Die For: A Hannah Swensen Mystery
programme.desc: When Hannah's customer and Delores' theater rival is murdered, Hannah must find her killer in order to save her mother's reputation. Chad and Hannah's romance blossoms.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: 80 for Brady
programme.desc: Four best friends live life to the fullest when they embark on a wild trip to see their hero, Tom Brady, play in the 2017 Super Bowl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: When James Bond's (Daniel Craig) latest assignment goes terribly wrong, it leads to a calamitous turn of events: Undercover agents around the world are exposed, and MI6 is attacked, forcing M (Judi Dench) to relocate the agency. With MI6 now compromised inside and out, M turns to the one man she can trust: Bond. Aided only by a field agent (Naomie Harris), Bond takes to the shadows and follows a trail to Silva (Javier Bardem), a man from M's past who wants to settle an old score.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: Bash does his best to celebrate Eid with his sister Amira, but she wishes they could continue the traditions they had back home; Theo treats a teenage patient who wants to avoid telling his parents why he's in the hospital.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Lacey is the unlikely champion of an eating contest; Emma enjoys the pleasures of an MP3 player.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey sponsor Davis' football team; Karen's reckless driving puts Hank in the driver's seat.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy seeks the death penalty in the case of a teenager accused of murdering a restaurant owner during an ill-fated delivery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Border Hunters
programme.desc: In Puerto Vallarta, Mexico, a fentanyl overdose claims the lives of an American youth and a paramedic, drawing the U.S. ambassador into a desperate mission to dismantle the cartels. When former spy Abraham Woodhill enlists imprisoned ex-operative Jake Byrne, a violent, high-stakes game unfolds across jungles, villages and cartel strongholds.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Now You See Me: Now You Don't
programme.desc: The Four Horsemen and a new generation of illusionists join forces to steal the world's largest diamond from a South African mogul who heads an international crime syndicate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: White Men Can't Jump
programme.desc: Two ballers, opposites who are seemingly miles apart, find they might have more in common than they imagined possible.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programme.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programme.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: The annual land blessing is thrown into disarray when one of the campers goes missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Born Hungry
programme.desc: Following the story of a runaway child from the streets of India who is adopted by a family and becomes one of the top chefs in the world.

programme.title: Flamin' Hot
programme.desc: Richard Montanez, the son of a Mexican immigrant, was a janitor at Frito-Lay when he came up with the idea for Flamin' Hot Cheetos. His creation, inspired by the flavors of his community, revitalized Frito-Lay and disrupted the food industry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Shifting Gears
programme.desc: Motor City mechanic Jess reluctantly agrees to participate in a car restoration show and is shocked to learn that her ex-boyfriend, Luke, is her main competitor.

programme.title: Transplant
programme.desc: An incident at work causes Bash to second-guess himself; Mags is inspired by a firefighter devoted to her work, even if it means risking her life on a daily basis, and June must learn to work with others.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent offers self-serve; Lacey goes buffet style at the Ruby.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: The air conditioner breaks at Corner Gas; Karen and Davis win the meat lottery.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A gay man is murdered and his adopted son taken in a case that first looks like a kidnapping until the facts uncover the possibility of a hate crime.
